mapper.select: SELECT BATTLE_ID as battleId, USER_ID as userId, STAGE_LEVEL as stageLevel, SUB_LEVEL as subLevel, MATCHUP_DATA as matchupData, AI_TEAM_DATA as aiTeamData, STATUS, CURRENT_SET as currentSet, MY_WINS as myWins, AI_WINS as aiWins, GAME_STATE_DATA as gameStateData, SET_RESULTS_DATA as setResultsData FROM TBL_PVE_BATTLE_SESSION WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} AND SUB_LEVEL = #{subLevel} AND STATUS = 'IN_PROGRESS'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PVE_BATTLE_SESSION ( USER_ID, STAGE_LEVEL, SUB_LEVEL, MATCHUP_DATA, MY_TEAM_DATA, AI_TEAM_DATA, CURRENT_SET, MY_WINS, AI_WINS, STATUS, GAME_STATE_DATA, SET_RESULTS_DATA ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{stageLevel}, #{subLevel}, #{matchupData}, #{myTeamData}, #{aiTeamData}, #{currentSet}, #{myWins}, #{aiWins}, #{status}, #{gameStateData}, #{setResultsData} )
